title: AWS Cloud Architecture
description: Designing scalable, resilient and secure AWS environments following AWS Well-Architected best practices.

title: Cloud Migration
description: Seamlessly migrating workloads, applications and databases to AWS with minimal downtime.

title: Cloud Security
description: Identity management, encryption, compliance, governance and cloud security assessments.

title: DevOps & CI/CD
description: Automating software delivery using GitHub Actions, Docker, Kubernetes and Terraform.

title: Cloud Monitoring
description: Real-time monitoring, logging and alerting using AWS CloudWatch and observability tools.

title: Cost Optimization
description: Reducing cloud spend while maximizing performance through AWS cost optimization strategies.

title: Disaster Recovery
description: Designing resilient backup and disaster recovery strategies to keep your business running.

title: Infrastructure as Code
description: Provisioning repeatable cloud infrastructure using Terraform and AWS best practices.
